title: Magical Crossbow of Kim Quy
summary: The legendary weapon that helped Au Lac defeat tens of thousands of invaders, a symbol of pride in ancient military technology.

slides.text: Before departing, the Golden Turtle gave An Duong Vuong a turtle claw and instructed: 'Use this claw as the trigger for a crossbow; you will have no worries when the enemy comes'.
slides.imagePrompt: Golden Turtle handing a glowing claw to An Dương Vương, sacred moment, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The King ordered General Cao Lo - a master of weapons - to create the Magic Crossbow. Each shot could destroy tens of thousands of enemy soldiers.
slides.imagePrompt: General Cao Lo demonstrating the large Magic Crossbow, glowing arrows, amazing power, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Ancient records state that the magical crossbow was named 'Linh Quang Than Co'. It symbolizes the pinnacle of weapon innovation of the Au Lac people.
slides.imagePrompt: Detailed view of the crossbow mechanics, ancient engineering, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Thanks to the magical crossbow and high citadel walls, the Au Lac army repeatedly defeated invasions from the North and protected the borders.
slides.imagePrompt: Invading soldiers retreating from arrows flying from Co Loa citadel, victory, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Who was directly responsible for creating the Magic Crossbow?
What was the trigger of the Magic Crossbow made of?
What did the Magic Crossbow symbolize for the Au Lac people?
